business_objective: What measurable business outcome must the project achieve?
Is the request replacement, expansion, debottlenecking, compliance remediation or new product launch?
current_process: Describe the current process from raw-material receipt to finished-goods dispatch.
Which steps are manual, constrained or outsourced?
product: What products, viscosities, particle sizes, temperatures and sensitivities apply?
Provide representative samples and worst-case product properties.
capacity: What nominal, peak and future throughput is required?
What upstream and downstream speeds constrain the target?
cleaning: What cleaning method, chemicals, temperatures, validation and changeover time apply?
Are allergens, potent compounds or cross-contamination controls required?
integration: Define mechanical heights, product connections, signal handshakes, line control ownership and data protocols.
Which existing PLC/SCADA/MES systems must integrate?
commercial: What budget band, required delivery date, payment terms and Incoterms apply?
May suppliers quote partial lots, alternatives, rental, refurbished or staged options?
lifecycle: What FAT, SAT, IQ/OQ/PQ, training, documentation, warranty, service response and spares are required?
What expected asset life and support horizon applies?
